assertions.description: The 93x93mm backboard has 128 footprints, 1900 track segments, 499 vias, and a 0.12mm minimum track spacing (below the 0.127mm standard process limit). The analyzer correctly assigns dfm_tier='advanced' and flags the one violation. The courtyard overlap between U3 and U1 (2.4mm^2) is also correctly detected, likely from the STM32 and LDO sharing tight placement.
